# PDF BRIEFING: Excel Smart Study Guide — Selective Schools

## Basic Info
- **file:** excel_selective_yr9.pdf
- **publisher:** Pascal Press
- **edition:** 2022
- **total_pages:** 412
- **relevant_pages:** 45–380

## Layout
- **column_format:** single_column
- **question_numbering:** 1,2,3
- **options_format:** (A)(B)(C)(D)
- **answer_key_pages:** 381–395
- **answer_key_format:** grid
- **has_figures:** yes
- **figure_position:** below_question

## Subject Coverage
- **pages 1–44:** skip (cover, contents, introduction)
- **pages 45–120:** logical_reasoning
- **pages 121–200:** quantitative_reasoning
- **pages 201–280:** skip (not relevant to target exams)
- **pages 281–380:** science_reasoning
- **pages 381–395:** skip (answer key)
- **pages 396–412:** skip (index, notes)

## Sample Questions
- **has_samples:** yes
- **sample_pages:** 12, 67, 145

## Known Issues
- pages 78–82: poor scan quality, expect low OCR confidence
- pages 201–280: not relevant, mark entire range as skip
- double column layout begins page 121
- answer options sometimes wrap to next line pages 300–340

## Year Level
- **target_year:** 7–9
- **difficulty:** medium to hard

## Notes
This is a practice guide aimed at NSW and VIC selective school exam preparation.
Strong on logical reasoning patterns and quantitative word problems.
Science section focuses on data interpretation rather than knowledge recall.
